mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST p
AND p.POST_STATUS != 'DELETED'
AND p.IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden}
AND (p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.FK_MEMBERID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_STATUS = 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_POST SET IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT c
AND c.STATUS != 'DELETED'
AND c.IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden}
AND (c.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR c.FK_MEMBERID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMMENT SET IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
